TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_konv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_KONV,
types : t_adrc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ADR6.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: SELECT SINGLE * FROM t052 INTO wa_t052
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbrp INTO wa_vbrp
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T001W INTO WA_T001W
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LIKP INTO WA_LIKP
* lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
IT_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE wa_lines-tdline GV_CREDIT INTO GV_CREDIT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U004' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U003' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
* CONCATENATE GV_TRACK wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_TRACK SEPARATED BY space.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE gv_remark wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_remark SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U005' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U002' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_SOREM wa_lines-tdline INTO GV_SOREM SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'U005' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
READ TABLE IT_ADR INTO WA_ADR WITH KEY PARTN_ROLE = 'RE'.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_BILTO
CONCATENATE gv_bemail WA_BEMAIL-smtp_addr ',' INTO gv_bemail SEPARATED BY Space.
READ TABLE IT_ADR INTO WA_ADR WITH KEY PARTN_ROLE = 'WE'.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_SHIPTO
CONCATENATE gv_semail WA_SEMAIL-smtp_addr ',' INTO gv_semail SEPARATED BY Space.
READ TABLE IT_ADR INTO WA_ADR WITH KEY PARTN_ROLE = 'UR'.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT * FROM mara INTO table it_mara
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbrp INTO wa_vbrp
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbap INTO wa_vbap
* data: lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' OR LV_LATRS CA '!' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#'
** OR LV_LATRS CA '$' OR LV_LATRS CA '%' OR LV_LATRS CA '\^' OR LV_LATRS CA '' OR LV_LATRS CA '@' OR LV_LATRS CA '#' OR
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0001' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT * FROM makt INTO table it_makt
READ TABLE it_makt INTO wa_makt WITH key matnr = wa_item-material.
READ TABLE it_mara INTO wa_mara WITH key matnr = wa_item-material.
MODIFY IT_ITEM FROM wa_item TRANSPORTING ITEM maktx cust_mat mat_price netwr netwr2.
